server/tests/test_api.py :: test_convert_png_to_jpeg
def test_convert_png_to_jpeg(client: TestClient) -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(18, 18, 120, 30, 60))
    response = client.post(
        "/convert",
        data={"format": "jpg", "max_mb": "1"},
        files={"image": ("sample.png", payload, "image/png")},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["content-type"].startswith("image/jpeg")
    assert response.content.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_api.py :: test_convert_png_to_gif
def test_convert_png_to_gif(client: TestClient) -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(20, 14, 80, 160, 40))
    response = client.post(
        "/convert",
        data={"format": "gif", "max_mb": "1"},
        files={"image": ("sample.png", payload, "image/png")},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["content-type"] == "image/gif"
    assert response.content.startswith(b"GIF89a")

server/tests/test_api.py :: test_convert_invalid_format_returns_json_error
def test_convert_invalid_format_returns_json_error(client: TestClient) -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(8, 8, 1, 2, 3))
    response = client.post(
        "/convert",
        data={"format": "bmp", "max_mb": "1"},
        files={"image": ("sample.png", payload, "image/png")},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 400
    body = response.json()
    assert "error" in body

server/tests/test_api.py :: test_convert_with_crop_and_filter
def test_convert_with_crop_and_filter(client: TestClient) -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(24, 24, 200, 100, 50))
    response = client.post(
        "/convert",
        data={
            "format": "png",
            "max_mb": "2",
            "crop_x": "4",
            "crop_y": "4",
            "crop_w": "12",
            "crop_h": "12",
            "filter": "grayscale",
        },
        files={"image": ("sample.png", payload, "image/png")},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.content.startswith(b"\x89PNG")
